name: Device Info Test
author: PermsTest
description: Bundled native plugin that displays Android build, device, ABI, display, and storage details.
comments: Small test plugin for validating bundled restore, native action dispatch, syntax highlighting, and optional Run In Window behavior.

entry.notes: Actions map to handlers registered by dev.perms.test.plugins.PluginActionRegistry.

actions.title: Show Device Info
actions.description: Collect a compact build/device report using getprop, uname, wm, and df.
